chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6000 of 2023 Akhtar Saeed Khan Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28008/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 04.09.2024 None present for petitioner. M/s. Riaz Ahmed, Director (Law), Azhar Hussain Tanvir, Director (Admn.), Abdullah Hanjrah, Deputy Director (Law) and Sarmad Sarwar, Assistant Director (Law) from Election Commission of Pakistan in person. -.-.- On the last date petitioner was directed to place on record the English version of the memo of petition, he has failed. He was called absent on the last date and so also today. There is no intimation either. The petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
